name: Flagship Layout & Spanish Branding
goal: Refine the root layout and global styles for TableRelay to achieve a flagship design standard.
changes: Standardized all UI labels to Spanish (Tablero, Mesa de Producción, Ficha de Personaje).
Implemented desktop-specific 1-click navigation for power users (Stage Operators).
Reduced header density by moving metadata (Character Count) to the sidebar footer.
Polished accessibility elements (Skip to Content) to match the 'Digital Grimoire' hex-clip aesthetic.
context: The project is now visually robust and professionally localized. Next steps would involve applying these same 'Flagship' standards to the individual view routes (+page.svelte) within each role-based directory.
